nodes.name: 诺福克郡
nodes.summary: 诺福克郡是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括文须雀、白冠帶鵐，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 歐亞大陸
nodes.summary: 歐亞大陸是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联16种鸟类，包括黑嘴天鹅、角鸊鷉、北方中杜鹃等16种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 卡尔·林奈
nodes.summary: 卡尔·林奈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联115种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、角叫鴨、白臉樹鴨等115种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 满洲 (地名)
nodes.summary: 满洲 (地名)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联24种鸟类，包括中华秋沙鸭、花田鸡、斑胁田鸡等24种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 文须雀
nodes.summary: 文须雀（Bearded reedling，学名 Panurus biarmicus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联6个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括湿地、沼泽。

nodes.name: 基輔
nodes.summary: 基輔是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括文须雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 自然系统第十版
nodes.summary: 自然系统第十版是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联64种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、黑嘴樹鴨、加拿大雁等64种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The bearded reedling (Panurus biarmicus) is a small, long-tailed passerine bird found in reed beds near water in the temperate zone of Eurasia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb|left|Flock in the species' typical reed bed habitat during winter in Finland, the northernmost part of its distribution thumb|left|Juvenile male perched and moving around in reed beds in the Netherlands The bearded reedling is native to temperate Europe and Asia, ranging from Spain, France and the British Isles to the Manchurian region, but its distribution tends to be quite spotty because of its habitat preference. Maps often show most of its Asian range as a single large continuous section (instead of more spotty), but this is due to limited details in monitoring data from this area relative to the western part of its range.{{cite web| last=Malzer | first=I

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: A case study from western Poland | journal=Annales Zoologici Fennici | volume=44 | issue=1 | pages=35–42 | doi=10.2478/orhu-2023-0001 | doi-access=free }} Both adults and young may make eruptive dispersals outside the breeding season and in periods with limited food or cold weather bearded reedlings may perform other, most often local movements. The bearded reedling is a habitat specialist found in reed beds, primarily those with common reed, by fresh or brackish water lakes, swamps or rivers, but it also occurs in nearby tall grass-like vegetation such as bulrushes and true sedges. Especially during the breeding period the species quite strongly avoids non-floodable or dry parts of wetlands,{{cite journal| last1=Alambiaga | first1=I
